title: 3D completion and overlay parity
description: Bring the required 3D capability to v0.1 acceptance: base view availability, lazy bundle/fallback behavior, drag rotate, pan, wheel zoom, reset, fit, visible gizmo, zone/layer/kind placement, and auth/dataflow/boundary/permission/validation overlay parity where practical.
triage_notes: Cut from product principles §6, 03 3D view, and 04 engine acceptance. Completion: core fallback remains, real 3D bundle passes interaction/framing tests, and overlay-relevant model elements are visible or gracefully degraded in 3D. Use test/fixtures/pattern-samples as acceptance input for 3D/isometric framing and overlay parity because the set covers small, medium, large hybrid, and Android architectures.
